name: Ground Vehicle
description: Wheeled and tracked vehicles including cars, trucks, APCs, tanks, and buggies
postCreateNotes: Set MeshObject.Object to hull model path
Configure wheel/track models and suspension IK chains
Set up VehicleAnimationComponent with animation graph
Define engine power, max speed, and torque curves
Configure fuel capacity and consumption
Set up seat positions (driver, passengers, gunners)
Test physics and collision bounds

variants.name: car
postCreateNotes: Set up 4 wheels with suspension
Configure light armor (if applicable)
Set engine power: 80-150 kW typical
Define seating: 2-5 passengers

variants.name: truck
variants.description: Cargo trucks, transport, and logistics vehicles
postCreateNotes: Configure cargo/supply storage component
Set up 4-6 wheels with heavy suspension
Engine power: 150-300 kW typical
Define cargo capacity and weight limits

variants.name: apc
variants.description: Armored personnel carriers and light armor
postCreateNotes: Set up 4-6 wheels
Configure armor plating and protection
Set up weapon mounts (machine guns, cannons)
Define seating: 2-12 passengers + gunners
Configure viewports/periscopes for occupants

variants.name: tracked
variants.description: Tanks, tank destroyers, and tracked vehicles
postCreateNotes: Configure left/right track models and drive
Set up turret rotation and gun elevation
Define heavy armor and protection values
Configure main gun and coaxial weapon mounts
Set up smoke grenade launchers if applicable
Define engine power: 300-750 kW typical
